chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acq. Appeal No.S-32 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 05.01.2026 None present for appellant. ******** On the last date following order was passed; “None present for the appellant nor any intimation received. Accordingly, the matter is liable to be dismissed, however in the interest of justice, same is adjourned. To be fixed after four weeks.” Today same is the case as appellant remained unrepresented without intimation. It appears that the appellant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, the same is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ihsan/PS.
